features.description: Metrics struct created with all prometheus metric instances, registered in AppState

layers.name: structural
layers.fail_message: Metrics struct not found in src/server/metrics.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after adding Metrics struct

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test test_phase3b_prometheus_available test_metrics_new_registers_all test_metrics_encode_text test_app_state_with_metrics_enabled test_app_state_with_metrics_disabled -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -5 | grep -c 'test result: ok'

layers.name: runtime
layers.fail_message: Metrics registry not created at startup

features.description: GET /metrics returns prometheus text format when enable_metrics=true, 501 when disabled

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -cE 'pub async fn metrics\(' src/server/routes.rs && grep -c 'routes::metrics)' src/server/mod.rs | tail -1
layers.fail_message: metrics handler not found or not wired in router

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test test_metrics_handler -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -5 | grep -c 'test result: ok'

layers.name: runtime
layers.fail_message: /metrics endpoint did not return 200 with prometheus text

features.description: Operation handlers record duration and success metrics

layers.name: structural
layers.fail_message: Duration histogram not referenced in route handlers (expected multiple references across 9 operation handlers)

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test test_metrics_duration_observation test_metrics_success_increment test_metrics_size_gauge -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -5 | grep -c 'test result: ok'

layers.name: runtime
layers.fail_message: Duration not recorded after operation execution

features.description: Operation handlers record error metrics on failure

layers.name: structural
layers.fail_message: errors_total counter not referenced in route handlers (expected multiple references across operation handlers)

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test test_metrics_error_increment -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -5 | grep -c 'test result: ok'
layers.fail_message: Error counter metric unit test failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.fail_message: Error counter not incremented after operation failure

features.description: CLAUDE.md updated for src/server module with metrics documentation

layers.name: structural
layers.command: test -f src/server/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'metrics.rs' src/server/CLAUDE.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL
layers.fail_message: src/server/CLAUDE.md missing or doesn't mention metrics.rs

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: grep -q 'Parent Context' src/server/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Directory Structure' src/server/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Key Patterns' src/server/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Parent Rules' src/server/CLAUDE.md && echo VALID || echo INVALID

alternative_verification.command: grep -q 'Prometheus' src/server/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'metrics' src/server/CLAUDE.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL
